emails.subject: my new location
emails.body: my new location Hi Dan, I just got a call on a contract you routed to me at my old location. About three weeks ago, my group moved to the 21st floor. Please send all purchase/sale agreements to me at EB2127B and any processing/service agreements to Sylvia Campos at EB2127A. Sorry if I neglected to inform you earlier. Please let me know if you have any questions. Thanks! SBR

emails.subject: Re: my new location
emails.body: Re: my new location Sorry about that, I am guilty of coping the address info from prior memos. I will update my memos. Is the last one a Hunt Oil Company processing rights letter? That was the last item i transmitted. Stacey Richardson 06/01/2001 02:58 PM

emails.subject: Re: my new location
emails.body: That's probably it. Karen didn't tell me the counterparty name. I think she just got it today. Either way, I'll make sure that Sylvia gets it. Dan J Hyvl 06/01/2001 03:06 PM
